title: Welcome email series: what to send, when, and why most get it wrong
notes: Cover the purpose of each email in a 3-5 sequence. Contrast transactional welcome (single email) vs nurture sequence. Link to audit tool. Concrete examples for ecom vs SaaS.

title: The complete guide to Klaviyo flows for e-commerce
notes: Cover the 5 core flows: welcome, abandoned cart, abandoned browse, post-purchase, win-back. Include what to put in each email. Link to audit tool for self-assessment.

title: How to clean your email list — and when to sunset subscribers
notes: The case for a smaller, cleaner list. Define engagement windows (30/60/90 day). Sunset flow structure. Impact on deliverability and RPR.

title: SPF, DKIM, and DMARC explained for email marketers
notes: Plain-English explanation of each record and what it does. How to check if yours are set up correctly. What happens if DMARC is on monitoring vs enforcing. Common mistakes.

title: Abandoned cart email strategy: beyond the obvious 3-email sequence
notes: Cover timing, copy angle for each email, when to include discount vs not, how to structure the sequence for high vs low AOV. Mention browse abandonment as the underrated companion.

title: Post-purchase email flows that drive repeat orders
notes: The LTV case for post-purchase emails. What to send and when: order confirmation, delivery update, review request, cross-sell, replenishment. Keep it practical.

title: Email segmentation strategies that actually move revenue
notes: Cover engagement-based, purchase-based, and behavioural segmentation. Debunk 'send to everyone' thinking. Show RPR improvement with simple vs advanced segmentation.

title: Win-back email campaigns: how to re-engage lapsed subscribers
notes: Define what 'lapsed' means (90/180 days). The case for trying to win them back vs sunsetting. Email sequence structure. Subject line approaches. Sunset if unresponsive.

title: How to calculate email marketing ROI — and what most businesses get wrong
notes: Walk through attribution models. Introduce RPR as the primary metric. Cover contribution-to-total-revenue, flow-level vs campaign-level. Why opens and clicks are insufficient.

title: Klaviyo vs Mailchimp: which is right for your e-commerce store
notes: Honest comparison. Klaviyo wins on data depth, segmentation, and flow logic. Mailchimp still fine for simple newsletters. Migration path if switching. Don't be promotional.

title: Email deliverability: why your emails land in spam and how to fix it
notes: Inbox placement vs open rate. The three pillars: authentication, sender reputation, list hygiene. How to diagnose a deliverability problem. Google Postmaster Tools walkthrough.

title: Email marketing for SaaS: lifecycle stages and what to send at each one
notes: Different from ecom: focus on activation, adoption, expansion, retention. Trial-to-paid flow. Onboarding sequences. Churn prevention. Concrete examples.
